goal: Replace hub/station lesson with a teacher-led nucleus lecture using subtitles, optional ElevenLabs audio, focused organ lighting, and synchronized biology animations.
acceptance_notes: Old V1 station runtime is removed from Workspace and old lesson scripts are disabled.
Audio SoundIds remain blank until Roblox audio upload/moderation, so subtitles are the immediate fallback.
Teacher movement, organ captions, focus lighting, and animations are self-contained in Roblox.
Play-mode visual/audio behavior still needs manual review in the active Studio session.

remaining: Roblox SoundId playback after audio upload/moderation
